message:
feat(output): add health snapshot renderer and multi-level verbosity

Introduce HealthSnapshotRenderer and upgrade the verbosity system from
boolean to u8 levels (0=default, 1=verbose -v, 2=debug -vv):

- renderers.rs: RenderContext.verbose changes from bool to u8. Add
  is_verbose() (>=1) and is_debug() (>=2) helper methods. All existing
  verbose checks updated to use is_verbose(). New HealthSnapshotRenderer
  with render() for full health output (queue depths, ingest lag, DB
  status, observed panes, per-pane sequences at verbose, warnings) and
  render_compact() for one-line status summary. Supports both plain text
  and JSON output formats.

- mod.rs: Re-export HealthSnapshotRenderer, HealthDiagnostic, and
  HealthDiagnosticStatus from the renderers module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
